sections.title: Overview
content: Wardens stand between danger and their allies.
They specialize in battlefield control and resilience.

sections.title: Hit Points
content: Hit Points at 1st Level: 10 + Constitution modifier.
Hit Points at Higher Levels: 1d10 (or 6) + Constitution modifier.

sections.title: Proficiencies
content: Armor: Light armor, medium armor, shields.
Weapons: Simple weapons and martial weapons.

sections.title: Guardian Stance
content: As a bonus action, enter a defensive stance.
While in this stance, enemies provoke opportunity attacks even if they use Disengage.
